title: trader-workflows Architecture Refactoring — clean layers + ky + data proxy
summary: Execute architecture-refactoring-plan.md Phases A–G: config/logging, ky HTTP, move marketAgent to api/, data/ layer, orchestration/, domain decoupling, optional commander CLI.
decisions: CLI imports data/ for HTTP-backed endpoints, services/ for pure domain
graphRunner moves to orchestration/ not runtime/
Phase G commander is optional — execute only if A–F stable
